message: 🌱 Add linkerd: Linkerd proxy gRPC connections to unmeshed services result mission (#538)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,86 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "linkerd-5988-linkerd-proxy-grpc-connections-to-unmeshed-services-result-in-too-m",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "linkerd: Linkerd proxy gRPC connections to unmeshed services result in `TOO MANY PINGs` with specific keepalive settings",
+    "description": "Linkerd proxy gRPC connections to unmeshed services result in `TOO MANY PINGs` with specific keepalive settings. Requested by 8+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current linkerd deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your linkerd version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n linkerd -l app.kubernetes.io/name=linkerd\nhelm list -n linkerd 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working linkerd installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review linkerd configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant linkerd configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n linkerd -l app.kubernetes.io/name=linkerd\nkubectl get configmap -n linkerd -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=linkerd\n```\n### What is the issue?\n\nWe recently upgraded to linkerd stable-2.10 and discovered that some unmeshed applications would have connection disconnects after about 10 seconds. The general problem would present itself as:\n1."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Linkerd proxy gRPC connections to unmeshed services result",
+        "description": "Some HTTP/2 services are very finicky and particular about\nthe timing of pings. In particular, Go's implementation of gRPC\nrequires that clients and servers exactly match up the timing of their\nkeepalive pings. If pings are off for more than MAX_PING_STRIKES pings,\nthe connection will be closed via\n```yaml\n2021-04-01T16:46:05.991-04:00 | ERROR: 2021/04/01 16:46:05 transport: Got too many pings from the client, closing the connection.\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n linkerd -l app.kubernetes.io/name=linkerd\nkubectl get events -n linkerd --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Linkerd proxy gRPC connections to unmeshed services result\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Some HTTP/2 services are very finicky and particular about\nthe timing of pings. In particular, Go's implementation of gRPC\nrequires that clients and servers exactly match up the timing of their\nkeepalive pings. If pings are off for more than MAX_PING_STRIKES pings,\nthe connection will be closed via ENHANCE YOUR CALM.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "2021-04-01T16:46:05.991-04:00 | ERROR: 2021/04/01 16:46:05 transport: Got too many pings from the client, closing the connection.",
+        "const defaultKeepaliveInterval = 15 * time.Second",
+        "- name: LINKERD2_PROXY_INBOUND_ACCEPT_KEEPALIVE\n  value: 10000ms\n- name: LINKERD2_PROXY_OUTBOUND_CONNECT_KEEPALIVE\n  value: 10000ms"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "linkerd",
+      "graduated",
+      "networking",
+      "feature"
+    ],

+    ],

+      "Pod",
+      "Ingress",
+      "Namespace",
+      "Serviceaccount",
+      "Clusterrole",
+      "Clusterrolebinding",
+      "Customresourcedefinition",
+      "Mutatingwebhookconfiguration"
+    ],

+    },

+  },

+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with linkerd installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-11T02:02:40.222Z",
